name: Love is
overview: A story about six individuals - Lemuel, Omeng, Vladimir, Epoy, Inton and Shakespeare navigating their own separate lives but having their destinies intertwined through strange twists of fate that are mostly out of their control.  Will all six boys still have a chance at a happy ending?

trailers.title: LOVE IS The Series | OFFICIAL TRAILER [ENG/VIET SUB]
